events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Grounding electrode clamp not listed for direct burial, installed in a direct-burial location","Clamp not suitable for the environment, compromising grounding electrode system integrity"],"actions":["Replace clamp with a listed direct-burial grounding electrode connector (e.g., listed acorn/bronze clamp or exothermic weld connection)","Verify listing and marking for direct burial before backfill","Re-inspect connection after correction"],"rationale":"NEC 250.68 requires grounding electrode conductors and bonding jumpers to be connected by listed means suitable for the application; a clamp not listed for direct burial is non-compliant when buried, creating a defective grounding connection.","references":["NEC 250.50","NEC 250.68"]}
